title: viola palmata var. variabilis
intro: Viola palmata var. variabilis, also known as the variable pansy or marsh viola, is a plant species within the violet family (Violaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Viola palmata var. variabilis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cognitive function, and support the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be prepared by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
